title: Malaysia’s energy supplies secure ‘for decades’ after talks with Russia, deals with Turkmenistan: Anwar
summary: Russia has assured Malaysia of oil, gas and diesel supplies for at least the next 20 years, while Petronas signed new energy agreements with Turkmenistan.

title: Iran war live: Vance heads to Switzerland; Israel kills 16 in Lebanon
summary: Talks come as Iran says it is closing the Strait of Hormuz over Israel's deadly attacks on Lebanon.

title: Weak 3.3-magnitude earthquake hits waters off Johor
summary: The Malaysian Meteorological Department said the earthquake occurred at 1.17am, and tremors may be felt around Batu Pahat, Johor.
